textByHashes.b3d3b950d0f8bb40319b1c730a6020766d6f4eba: Sh sh sh, not so loud! You don't want to get me in trouble!
textByHashes.5ad7f775c60dc14f00248d5295df9ce6c9ffa942: But I don't want to get into trouble for revealing their hideout.
textByHashes.a5f3192714331b5a72b7fda57383ff72a176c916: Of course, if I was, say 20 gold coins richer I may happen to be more inclined to take that sort of risk...
textByHashes.79620ac548ba3a78d82f0a5680d5cf6ecef0235b: Ok, to get to the gang hideout, enter Varrock through the south gate. Then, if you take the first turning east, somewhere along there is an alleyway to the south. The door at the end of there is the entrance to the Phoenix
textByHashes.12617103eb6331a23b48d079ac901f436fc412c2: Gang. They're operating there under the name of the VTAM Corporation. Be careful. The Phoenixes ain't the types to be messed about.
textByHashes.ea3b2d6d58a57d92dabb177dd77f0d4e44ffe624: Heh. If you wanna deal with the Phoenix Gang they're involved in much worse than a bit of bribery.
textByHashes.614562f5f655311d1baef0deae37404ab24270e9: Shh, shh, shh! Not so loud! You don't want to get me in trouble, do you?
textByHashes.cddb364e3b918249fce60060cc353f7d5007464e: I may do... but I don't want to get into trouble for revealing their hideout. Of course, if I was, say 20 coins richer, I may happen to be more inclined to take that sort of risk...
textByHashes.80a784a9530dfdead68b35b2950c7e47877c3a9c: Okay, to get to the gang hideout, head to the southern gates of the city and then head down the alleyway past the Blue Moon Inn.
textByHashes.075cc4b045bd2129470cdcc47287511666b714fe: Down there you'll find a building owned by the VTAM corporation. That's where you'll find the Phoenix Gang. Just be careful. They ain't the types to be messed about.
textByHashes.4f0c719ae91385ba4e5fa16aeb800d445466b558: If you wanna deal with the Phoenix Gang, they're involved in much worse than a bit of bribery.
textByHashes.f2676e943f0303a0cc46d7e74e36fcedc166c32a: Yeah, sure. They're 20 gold coins each.
textByHashes.6e2968a2b5eb6cb8775928fa180ca080ddc29d4c: Well, my best price is 18 coins.
textByHashes.75a2f0e67a392a23ca78d4301df87d5d47cd1fda: Well, I can't go any cheaper than that mate. I've got a family to feed.
textByHashes.cb51ec7a5a60ae4d742c5712997ee8d6a6b9dd94: Well, I can't go any cheaper than that mate. I have a family to feed.
textByHashes.16e84c531d8b8bfee32c8907a69cffef88e7adef: Sorry kiddo, I'm a fur trader not a damsel in distress.
textByHashes.f5a3ee98bdf5884bb950d2a73d7b2ed6b94274bc: GREY WOLF FUR??? NOW you're talking!
textByHashes.b270b1bad7522c8f6a9fd19de665c8685cdca841: Grey wolf fur is something of a desirable item to me.
textByHashes.4dad93087bae06a3763ba9cea69e6c881b3affa9: I'll take all you have for 120 gold pieces per fur, does that sound fair?
textByHashes.9ff1d828f2ca49a50483b2a93d4bffce23ba7eba: Mmm, let me have another look.
textByHashes.b7a31d4f326a6da07ba77b284e16a0caf70c0f16: That is a really fine piece of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 150 gold pieces for it.
textByHashes.28300f29557df1f1251bc095fb599298ea68b3f9: Those are really fine pieces of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 150 gold pieces each for them.
textByHashes.c4fb837a6c9cb83d1f39a98082d6de67f48f6cb8: Let's have a look at it.
textByHashes.ba33fd90049c53aba26d72ee8ce009b236f9a0b5: It's not in the best condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for it.
textByHashes.ab7e179be6b02bac4c8c10d6fe218d09f90b3188: It's not in the best condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for each one.
textByHashes.99916c015b27a76d599f00504b0f1f831fe3e936: It's not in the best of condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for it.
textByHashes.43e7350e1ebe4c19c3681a48626e5d8e134a6c75: It's not in the best of condition. I guess I could give you 12 coins for each one.
textByHashes.f2986382b875189a2966d6f78e8b79a8ca4184a8: Oh ok. Didn't want it anyway!
textByHashes.afc5525d09a2c2c80d5e8d6766e9abd5cc6c33cb: That is a really fine piece of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 20 gold pieces for it.
textByHashes.caf6c28a15821ef02fd826abdd295394d3894069: Those are really fine pieces of fur. Tell you what, I'll give you 20 gold pieces each for them.
